metadata.title: Qvicko — Automations, E-commerce & Web Solutions
metadata.description: Qvicko by William Soderstrom. I build AI automations, custom e-commerce solutions, modern websites and digital AI services that drive growth for your business.

servicesDropdown.showcaseDesc: Watch AI build a real website
servicesDropdown.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to go live

hero.title: I build digital solutions
hero.description: Hi, I'm William Soderstrom — founder of Qvicko. I help businesses automate, sell more online and grow digitally with AI-powered solutions and modern web technology.

builder.title: Your website, live in minutes
builder.subtitle: No coding, no hassle. Describe your business and our AI builds a complete, professional website — ready to publish instantly.

speed.title: Lightning fast launch
speed.description: Go from idea to live website in under 5 minutes. AI handles the design, copywriting, and structure so you can focus on running your business.

design.title: Stunning design, every time
design.description: Every site is custom-built with modern design principles. Mobile-first, visually polished, and tailored to your brand identity.

seo.title: Built-in SEO power
seo.description: Every page is optimized for search engines from day one. Meta tags, fast load times, and structured content that Google loves.

showcase.title: From blank page to business asset
showcase.description: Watch how our AI transforms a simple description into a fully designed, responsive website. Upload your brand, add a few details — and we handle the rest.
showcase.videoHint: Tip: A short explainer or screen recording showing the AI building a real site in real-time works great here.

seoBoost.title: Supercharge your traffic with SEO landing pages
seoBoost.description: Create targeted landing pages that rank on Google and drive qualified visitors to your business. Each page is optimized for specific keywords and local search — giving your business an unfair advantage online.

point1.title: Keyword-targeted pages
point1.desc: AI generates landing pages focused on the search terms your customers actually use.

point2.title: Local SEO domination
point2.desc: Rank in your city, your neighborhood, your niche — with pages built for local intent.

point3.title: Automatic optimization
point3.desc: Pages are continuously improved based on performance data and search trends.

point4.title: Measurable results
point4.desc: Track traffic, rankings, and conversions directly from your dashboard.

simpleSteps.title: Three steps. That's it.
simpleSteps.subtitle: No meetings, no proposals, no waiting around. Just a website that works.

step1.title: Describe your business
step1.description: Tell us your company name, industry, and what makes you unique. Or paste the URL of your existing site to transform it.

step2.title: AI builds your site
step2.description: Our AI creates a complete website with design, copy, images, and SEO — all tailored to your brand in seconds.

step3.title: Publish and grow
step3.description: Go live instantly with a free subdomain, or connect your own domain. Start getting traffic and customers right away.

ctaNew.title: Your competitors already have a website. Do you?
ctaNew.description: Stop overthinking it. Get a professional, SEO-optimized website in minutes — not months. No technical skills needed.
ctaNew.note: Free to start — no credit card required

checklist.title: Get started
checklist.companyInfoDesc: Add your company name, organisation number, and contact details under your account settings. This information is used on invoices and for your website's footer.
checklist.choosePlanDesc: Select a subscription plan that suits your needs. You can start with a free trial and upgrade at any time from the billing page.
checklist.publishSiteDesc: Once you're happy with your website design and content, publish it to make it live and accessible to visitors.
checklist.customDomain: Register and verify a custom domain
checklist.customDomainDesc: Connect your own domain name (e.g. yourcompany.com) to your website. Follow the DNS verification steps to complete the setup.
checklist.searchConsole: Index your site on Google Search Console

checklist.installAppsDesc: Browse the app library and install apps that enhance your website, such as analytics, contact forms, or a blog.

pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.freePlanDesc: Perfect for trying out the platform.
pricing.basicPlanDesc: Everything you need to go live.
pricing.proPlanDesc: For businesses that want it all.

faq.a1: Qvicko is an AI-powered website builder created by William Söderström. It lets you create a professional, SEO-optimized website in minutes — just describe your business and our AI handles the design, copy, and structure. No coding skills required.
faq.q2: Can I try it for free?
faq.a2: Yes! You can create a website completely free. The Free plan lets you build and preview your site on a qvickosite.com subdomain. When you're ready to publish with your own domain, upgrade to Basic or Pro.
faq.q3: What happens after my free trial ends?
faq.a3: After your 30-day free trial, your subscription automatically continues at the plan price. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends and you won't be charged.
faq.q4: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a4: Yes! With the Basic or Pro plan you can connect your own domain. You can also purchase a new domain directly through Qvicko — DNS is configured automatically.
faq.q5: How does the AI website builder work?
faq.a5: Simply describe your business — name, industry, and what makes you unique. Our AI creates a complete website with design, copy, images, and SEO optimization in seconds. You can also transform an existing website by entering its URL.
faq.a6: Absolutely. There are no lock-in periods. You can cancel your subscription at any time and it will remain active until the end of your current billing period.
faq.q7: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a7: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure payment partner Stripe.
faq.q8: Is my website optimized for search engines?
faq.a8: Yes! Every website built with Qvicko is SEO-optimized from day one. This includes meta tags, fast load times, mobile responsiveness, and structured content that search engines love.

siteSettings.title: Settings
siteSettings.subtitle: Manage website settings
siteSettings.openingHoursDescription: Set opening hours for your business. Used in structured data (JSON-LD) for better visibility in Google search results.
siteSettings.tipMetaTitle: The page title appears in the browser tab and as the heading in Google search results. Keep it under 60 characters.
siteSettings.tipMetaDescription: The description appears below the title in search results. A good description increases click-through rate. Max 160 characters.
siteSettings.tipMetaKeywords: Keywords help search engines understand the page content. Separate with commas. Impact on ranking is limited but can help.
siteSettings.tipOgImage: The image shown when sharing on social media (Facebook, LinkedIn, X). Recommended size: 1200x630px.
siteSettings.tipFavicon: The small icon shown in the browser tab. Recommended size: 32x32px or 64x64px.
siteSettings.tipRobots: Controls whether search engines index the page and follow its links. 'noindex' hides the page from Google.
siteSettings.tipLanguage: The language is used in the HTML lang attribute and affects how search engines index and display the page.
siteSettings.tipBusinessName: Your business name appears in the footer, contact section, and in structured data for Google.
siteSettings.tipBusinessEmail: Contact email appears in the contact section and in structured data.
siteSettings.tipBusinessPhone: Phone number appears in the contact section and in structured data. Use international format (+46...).
siteSettings.tipBusinessAddress: The address appears in the contact section and in structured data for local search results.
siteSettings.tipBusinessOrgNumber: The organization number is displayed in the footer. Required by Swedish law for businesses.
siteSettings.tipOpeningHours: Opening hours are shown in Google search results via structured data (schema.org). Helps customers quickly see when you're open.

meta.title: Free Business Name Generator — AI-Powered | Qvicko
meta.description: Generate creative and professional business names with AI. Describe your business and get 25 unique name suggestions instantly. Completely free.

nameGenerator.subtitle: Describe your business idea and let AI generate 25 creative name suggestions for your company.
nameGenerator.placeholder: E.g. a sustainable online clothing store selling Scandinavian fashion...
nameGenerator.label: Describe your business
nameGenerator.limitReached: You've reached today's limit. Come back tomorrow!
nameGenerator.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
nameGenerator.errorMinLength: Describe your business with at least 3 characters.
nameGenerator.ctaTitle: Ready to start your business online?
nameGenerator.ctaDescription: Create a professional website for your new business in under 5 minutes with Qvicko.
nameGenerator.faq1q: Is the business name generator free?
nameGenerator.faq1a: Yes, completely free! You can generate up to 20 rounds of name suggestions per day.
nameGenerator.faq2q: How does the AI name generation work?
nameGenerator.faq2a: Our AI analyzes your business description and generates 25 unique, creative, and professional name suggestions tailored to your industry and business.
nameGenerator.faq3q: Can I use the names freely?
nameGenerator.faq3a: Yes, all generated names are free to use. However, we recommend checking that the name isn't already registered as a trademark.
nameGenerator.faq4q: What if I want more suggestions?
nameGenerator.faq4a: Just click generate again! You can also adjust your description to get different types of name suggestions.

meta.title: Free Color Palette Generator — Web Design Colors | Qvicko
meta.description: Find the perfect color palette for your website. Browse 54 professionally curated color palettes with preview. Completely free.

colorPalette.subtitle: Find the perfect color combination for your website. Browse 54 professionally curated palettes.
colorPalette.previewText: Body text with text color on the background. This is how your website will look with this color palette.
colorPalette.ctaTitle: Like a palette? Use it right away!
colorPalette.ctaDescription: Create a professional website with your favorite color palette in under 5 minutes.
colorPalette.faq1q: Is the color palette generator free?
colorPalette.faq1a: Yes, completely free! Browse all 136 palettes and copy the color codes directly.
colorPalette.faq2q: How do I choose the right color palette?
colorPalette.faq2a: Think about your industry and target audience. Blue tones convey trust, green signals sustainability, and warm tones feel inviting.
colorPalette.faq3q: Can I use the palettes commercially?
colorPalette.faq3a: Absolutely! All palettes are free to use in your projects.
colorPalette.faq4q: Do the palettes work for mobile sites?
colorPalette.faq4a: Yes, all palettes are designed to work well on both desktop and mobile.
